common.data_desc_api_key: API key to connect to your LibreNMS instance.
common.data_desc_ssl_verify: Whether to verify the SSL certificate when SSL encryption is used to connect to your LibreNMS instance.
common.data_desc_url: The full URL of your LibreNMS instance.

abort.already_configured: This LibreNMS instance is already configured.

auth_error.message: Authentication failed, please update your API key

cannot_connect.message: Cannot connect to your LibreNMS instance.

update_error.message: An error occurred while retrieving data from your LibreNMS instance: {error}
